definition:
1. of  or for a man , (Aeschulus Tragicus), etc.; for αὐλοὶ ἀνδρεῖοι, see. αὐλός. 
2. manly, masculine , (Herdotus Historicus), attic; in bad sense, stubborn , (Lucian):—;neuter τὸ ἀνδρεῖον, by crasis τἀνδρεῖον, = ἀνδρεία, (Euripides) 
3. of things, strong, vigorous , (Aristophanes Comicus) (ML)
